subject: Re: Crash in M
body:

在2020年11月16日星期一 UTC+8 上午1:27:05<Qiang Su> 写道：

> Hi  Dimitry,
> I am studying the amazing Warp & M software. I am using the tile series 
> data  EMPIAR-10164 <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/pdbe/emdb/empiar/entry/10164/> you 
> suggest. I strictly follow the procedure. Everything goes well in Warp, 
> IMOD and RELION. I used bin4 pixel size (1.35X4=5.4) not you suggest in the 
> paper. However, when I imported the data into M, M is crashed. The crash 
> information is as below. I also attached the parameter of the refine. Could 
> you please help me on this problem? Is there any GPU memory or parameter 
> problem? 
>
> CPU: Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 6132 CPU @ 2.60GHz   2.59 GHz
> RAM 128G
>
> GPUV100, 32G
>
> Thanks,
>
> Qiang
> [image: crash3.PNG]
> [image: M.PNG][image: Refine.PNG]
>
